title: Faithful: PAEColorSolid param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 2.3 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEColorSolid must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEColorSolid to range extremes across hosts ['Movements__Flip', 'Movements__Multi-flip', 'Stylized__Light_Sweep'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=2.30 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEColorSolid implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEColorSolid` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Movements__Flip", "param": "object/colorsolid/color/green", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.5, "oracle_signal": 91.068, "ddb": 2.3}, {"host": "Movements__Flip", "param": "object/colorsolid/color/blue", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.5, "oracle_signal": 91.068, "ddb": 2.69}, {"host": "Movements__Flip", "param": "object/colorsolid/color/red", "theta": 0.5, "t": 0.5, "oracle_signal": 91.068, "ddb": 4.871}, {"host": "Movements__Flip", "param": "object/colorsolid/color/green", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 104.312, "ddb": 5.359}, {"host": "Stylized__Light_Sweep", "param": "object/colorsolid/color/blue", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.9, "oracle_signal": 137.308, "ddb": 5.377}, {"host": "Stylized__Light_Sweep", "param": "object/colorsolid/color/blue", "theta": 0.5, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 137.308, "ddb": 5.377}]
